messages.content: write without pronouns: In this case, you need to make a chai
In this case, one needs to make chai.
and it: Now you can use the map in the new engine.
The map in the new engine can now be used.

and it: Running Propper is an exact equivalent to creating maps, except that instead of maps with vbsp you will be creating an object and converting it into a model. Provide the current game directory and your vmf file when prompted.
To run Propper, one can create an object and convert it into a model, similar to creating maps with vbsp. When prompted, the current game directory and vmf file should be provided.
and it: If you have converted this structure into a “Func_detail”,
If this structure has been converted into a "Func_detail",
and it: Hammer offers two ways to track items in your level
Two ways are offered by Hammer to track items in the level.
and it: Therefore, I will
Therefore, one will
and it:  Therefore, I will choose [[MBSPC]] as the decompiler tool
Therefore, [[MBSPC]] will be chosen as the decompiler tool.
Demonstration on the banco model: правильно написано
Yes, "Demonstration on the banco model" is written correctly.
переведи: SirYodaJedi' Porting IdTech 3 Maps to Source
"Перенос карт IdTech 3 в Source от SirYodaJedi".

переведи: Это руководство также может помочь/непомочь при портировании с {{gldsrc|4|nt=1}} и ко всем  его производным и более старым/новым ({{svencoop}}{{hlop4}}{{czds}}{{csxbox}}{{csnz} }{{cscz}}{{cof}}{{bb}}{{рикошет}}{{боевик}}{{cso}}{{hlbs}}{{hlps2}}{{dmc}}{{quake} }{{quake2}}{{quake3}}{{qtf}}{{tfc}}{{nightfire}}){{clarify}}, однако, некоторые из движков имеют фундаментальные различия, поэтому процесс может существенно но для некоторых требуется другая работа или программы, например декомпиляторы карт, такие как [[BSP Decompiler 005]] для {{nightfire|4}}.}}

This guide can also help/not help with porting to {{gldsrc|4|nt=1}} and all of its derivatives, as well as older/newer ones ({{svencoop}}{{hlop4}}{{czds}}{{csxbox}}{{csnz } }{{cscz}}{{cof}}{{bb}}{{рикошет}}{{боевик}}{{cso}}{{hlbs}}{{hlps2}}{{dmc}}{{quake}}{{quake2}}{{quake3}}{{qtf}}{{tfc}}{{nightfire}}){{clarify}}, but some engines have fundamental differences, so the process may be significantly different and may require other work or programs, such as BSP Decompiler 005 for {{nightfire|4}}.
